Off Calendar Aug-23-2006 Continued To Sep-13-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for administrator. Charles Katz appearing for and with Inez O'Banner. The 1st account, report, fees and for final distribution are all in order except for where the distribution should go. The petition for instructions is asking to create a trust that is not part of the will. Distribution of the minors' funds can go to a custodian under CUTMA into three blocked accounts. Ms. Ng will need to file an amendment to final distribution. Notice was not sent to Sam Cassina. Counsel's investigator is looking for the mother's address to send notice. Mr. Katz's petition is off calendar. Accounting petition is continued to 9/13. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
